items.title: Bandi Sanjay’s son misses time to appear before investigators in POCSO case, women stage protest at police station
items.summary: Cyberabad police served Bandi Sai Bhagirath a notice directing him to appear before investigators at Petbasheerabad police station by 2 p.m. on Wednesday
